headline: Technology Dashboard 2025: U.S. remains leading country of origin for European patent applications as China makes gains
summary: Companies and inventors from around the world filed a record 201 974 patent applications last year at the European Patent Office (EPO), according to the EPO Technology Dashboard 2025 (formerly Patent Index) published today.
